title: erodium laciniatum subsp. soluntinum
intro: Erodium laciniatum subsp. soluntinum, also known as the Cypriot heron's bill, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the geranium family, native to Cyprus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erodium laciniatum subsp. soluntinum include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antibacterial agent, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
